statement: In every magma, Equation 975 (`x = y * ((z * y) * (w * w))`) implies Equation 407 (`x * y = (z * w) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0451
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z y) (op w w)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op z w) y)
